mapper.insert: insert into exam_paper (title, description, total_score, duration, pass_score, question_count,creator_id) values (#{title},#{description},#{totalScore},#{duration},#{passScore},#{questionCount},#{userId})

# 根据列表questionId逐个加入副标 INSERT INTO exam_paper_question (paper_id, question_id, question_type, score,sort_order) VALUES
( #{paperId}, #{q.questionId}, #{q.questionType}, #{q.questionScore}, ${idx + 1} )
